title: 5 facts about U.S. children living in blended families
summary_en: 17% of U.S. children under 18 live in a blended family most or all of the time – one that includes a stepparent, stepsiblings or half siblings.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心发布美国重组家庭儿童相关五项事实

title: What types of news do Americans seek out or happen to come across?
summary_en: About half of U.S. adults (49%) say they mostly get news because they happen to come across it, up from 39% in 2019.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心发布美国成年人新闻获取方式专项调查结果
